parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'agent_health_monitor', experiment_id: 'health_scan_' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,16).replace(/[T:]/g,'_'), output_type: 'health_scan', content: $('Analyze All Agents').first().json, confidence: 1.0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ actor: 'agent_health_monitor', action: 'write_experimental_output', target: 'experimental_outputs', details: { scan_time: $('Analyze All Agents').first().json.scan_time, total_agents_checked: $('Analyze All Agents').first().json.total_agents_checked, agents_with_issues: $('Analyze All Agents').first().json.agents_with_issues, agents_retiring: $('Analyze All Agents').first().json.agents_retiring } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'agent_health_monitor', message: '🔴 Health scan: ' + $json.agents_with_issues + ' agent(s) with consecutive errors (' + $json.agents_retiring + ' need retirement). Issues: ' + $json.issues.map(i => i.agent_name + ' (' + i.consecutive_errors + ' errors)').join(', '), trigger_url: 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/agent-health-monitor' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'agent_health_monitor', message: '🚨 AUTO-RETIRED: ' + $('Check Retiring').item.json.agent_name + ' had ' + $('Check Retiring').item.json.consecutive_errors + ' consecutive errors. Status set to paused in registry. Run /activate_agent ' + $('Check Retiring').item.json.agent_name + ' to restore.', trigger_url: 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/agent-health-monitor' }) }}
